allAppsSubtitle: Manage all your shortcuts in one place
newSectionDesc: Create a new section to group your applications
renameSectionDesc: Change the name of the section for your shortcuts
confirmDeleteSection: Delete section «{0}»? All its shortcuts will be deleted.
noSectionsSubtitle: Create a section to add shortcuts.
newShortcutDesc: Add a new shortcut to your section
noShortcutsSubtitle: There are no shortcuts here yet.
defaultIconPlaceholder: The standard icon will be used
enterValidName: Please enter a valid shortcut name.
enterExePath: Please provide a path to the .exe file.
exeMustBeExe: The selected file must have .exe extension.
iconInvalid: Icon must be an image (.png, .jpg, .ico, .svg) or a data:image.
discordDesc: Allows the application to display discord rich presence on your profile
hotkeyDesc: Key combination that will bring up the window
themeDesc: Choose the color scheme for application
shortcutsDesc: Choose how shortcuts are visually arranged
l10nDesc: Select your preferred language for the program interface
updatesDesc: Check for a new version of the application
hotkeyInvalidFinal: Unsupported key. Use A–Z, 0–9 or F1–F12.
couldNotCheck: Could not check for updates. Try again later.
noInternet: There may be no internet connection — cannot check for updates.
latestInstalled: You have the latest version of the application
updateCheckFailed: Could not check for updates (server error).
startWithSystemDesc: The application will start automatically when the system starts up
trayOnCloseDesc: The application will continue to run in the system tray when the window is closed
backupsDesc: Export, import data, or perform a full reset
confirmResetSections: Reset sections to default? This will remove all custom shortcuts.
selectExeNotAvailable: Select-exe dialog is not available in this environment.
selectIconNotAvailable: Select-icon dialog is not available in this environment.
sectionNotFound: Section not found — cannot save shortcut.
launchNotAvailable: Launch is not available in this environment.
launchFileNotFound: The application could not be started. Please check the file path.
noPathForShortcut: No path specified for this shortcut.
dropOnlyExeOrLnk: Please drop only .exe files or Windows shortcuts (.lnk).
shortcutResolveFailed: Failed to resolve the shortcut target.
shortcutResolveNotAvailable: Shortcut resolution is not available in this environment.
noDestinationSection: No destination section available to add the shortcut.
openShortcutModalFailed: Failed to open the add-shortcut dialog.
notifyMsg: Please restart the application to apply changes
